calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:29am
Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Jose Reynosa & Josefina Tolama Coba appear in pro per with Roger Campos who translates. Respondent, Celia Colon, appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge O'Grady.

Appellants call witness Blanca Santana.
Appellants call witness Jesus Alejo

EXHR (A) various documents and a receipt (CPS documents & receipt are returned to respondent)

11:34am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-29-2010 Judgment Entered
